raises.purpose: Growth capex — funding dedicated OEM facility expansion
raises.source: QIP allotment approved by Securities Issue Committee, 3 Mar 2025; floor price INR1,303.08/share, issue price INR1,280/share
raises.note: Qualified Institutions Placement, not a promoter/promoter-group raise — allottees were institutional investors. Included here for completeness of the capital-raise record referenced in the CARE rating rationale's 'planned equity raise' liquidity commentary.
